value.found_quote: Secure sandbox execution: Empowering agents to safely solve complex computational problems and automate workflows through dynamic Code Execution and Computer Use, allowing them to run scripts or mimic human-like interactions with graphical interfaces.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Code Execution" offering under the "Sandbox" section of Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. It describes it as enabling agents to "safely solve complex computational problems and automate workflows" by allowing them to "run scripts" — matching the claim's description of a sandboxed, provider-hosted environment. The page also lists dedicated "Code Execution overview" and "Code Execution quickstart" guides, confirming it as a real, documented offering. Additionally, the page banner states "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'", indicating the overall platform (and this feature) is in preview/pre-GA status.
